title: Planned power outage: George South
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power...
bodyText:
[{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power outage for a portion of George South on Thursday 5 February from 09:00 to 16:00 for alterations to the electrical mains.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power outage for a portion of George South on Thursday 5 February from 09:00 to 16:00 for alterations to the electrical mains."},{"type":"heading","text":"The following streets will be affected:","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MitchellFichat","html":"
  • Mitchell
  • Fichat
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period.","html":"Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Should circumstances prevent the work being carried out during the abovementioned period, the work will be done on Tuesday 10 February from 09:00 to 16:00.","html":"Should circumstances prevent the work being carried out during the abovementioned period, the work will be done on Tuesday 10 February from 09:00 to 16:00."}]
